name: sibergate
description: SiberGate — a simple, fast, self-hosted OpenAI-compatible AI gateway with smart routing (fallback, fastest, load balancing).

scripts.dev: npm run build:core && concurrently -n gateway,admin -c blue,magenta "tsx watch packages/gateway/src/index.ts" "npm run dev -w @sibergate/admin"
scripts.dev:gateway: npm run build:core && tsx watch packages/gateway/src/index.ts
scripts.build: npm run build -w @sibergate/core && npm run build -w @sibergate/gateway
